author: xabiercidvidal
body:
#### PR description:

This PR refactors RecoMTD/TrackExtender/plugins/TrackExtenderWithMTD.cc by extracting three utility types that were previously defined in a local anonymous namespace into proper shared headers under RecoMTD/TimingTools/interface/, in the mtd:: namespace:

MTDHitMatchingInfo > stores per-hit geometric and time-compatibility chi values used during MTD hit matching, including the combined sorting criterion
TrackSegments > accumulates per-track path-length segments and sigma-tof contributions for TOF PID computation
TrackTofPidInfo > holds the per-hypothesis (/K/p) TOF PID output (t_mtd, sigma_t_mtd, tof_pi/K/p, sigma_tof_pi/K/p)
The logic of all three types is identical to the original anonymous-namespace definitions; only the enclosing scope and header location change. TrackExtenderWithMTD.cc is updated to include the new headers and drop the local definitions.

##### Expected output changes: none:  
this is a pure code-organisation refactoring. Validated by running the full Phase-2 MTD DQM workflow (step3 RECO+DQM + step4 harvest, D121 no-PU TTbar, 900 events) and confirming bit-for-bit identical histograms vs. the unmodified baseline.

##### Dependencies: none.

#####  Related PRs: 
this PR is the common base for three follow-up PRs (submitted separately):

mtd-pr2-timing-info: replaces 20 separate edm::ValueMap products with a single reco::MTDTimingInfo object
mtd-pr3-hit-matcher: extracts MTDHitMatcher as a standalone utility class
mtd-pr4-path-length: extracts path-length and TOF utilities into RecoMTD/TimingTools


#### PR validation:

Full Phase-2 simulation chain validated locally on CMSSW_20_1_X (branch rebased onto master tip 815a9fd69c8, 2026-06-29):

(RECO + DQM): 9 jobs  100 events, Phase-2 D121 geometry, no pileup, TTbar input from DigiRaw
(DQM harvesting): hadd of 9 step3 DQM files + cmsRun harvesting step
Comparison of all MTD histograms in the harvested DQM ROOT file between this PR and the baseline (unmodified TrackExtenderWithMTD.cc) using per-bin TH1::GetBinContent() differences: zero bin differences across all 827 MTD-specific histograms.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Not a backport. No backport intended at this time.
title: RecoMTD: extract TrackSegments into shared TimingTools header
